product.name: ArGiyim Sultan
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra Durable, Ultra Breathable Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton, PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High Visible, Flame Retardant, Chemical Resistant, Antistatic Satin Fabric
product.specLine: 330 g/m², 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon High Visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 4/1 Satin Woven Fabric
descriptions: 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical resistant satin fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim²45 are used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pans and trousers.
Certified for EN ISO 20471, EN 11612, EN 1149-5, EN 61482 and EN 13034.
49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High Visible, Flame Retardant, Chemical Resistant, Antistatic Satin Fabric
330 g/m², 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon High Visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 4/1 Satin Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 49% Polyester (PES) 50% Cotton (CO) 1% Carbon (CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 2000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 35N ; Weft > 30N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Heat and Flame Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612

matches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and repeated 'High Visible' designation, with stated application as Hi Vis Pans, directly supports high-visibility apparel use.
Explicit certified electric-arc protection (EN 61482 Class 1) combined with antistatic certification directly supports electrical/high-voltage protective use relevant to the energy sector.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Chemical resistance and FR properties are present but no explicit welding, foundry or metal-splash use is stated.
EN ISO 11612 heat and flame protection is certified but no explicit firefighter turnout gear or fire brigade use is stated.
